title: Acourtia scaposa
taxonomy: Acourtia scaposa is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It belongs to the genus Acourtia and is a type of shrub. The classification of Acourtia scaposa is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Asterales, Family: Asteraceae, Genus: Acourtia, Species: A. scaposa. Acourtia scaposa is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is also known as a perennial shrub with small white or pink flowers.
